calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Broward County Public Schools in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Broward County Public Schools is Monday, August 11, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Broward County Public Schools in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Broward County Public Schools is Friday, June 5, 2026. The school year runs from August through June, covering 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2025-2026 for Broward County Public Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Broward County Public Schools runs Mar 16, 2026–Mar 20, 2026, 5 days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2025-2026 for Broward County Public Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Broward County Public Schools runs Dec 22, 2025–Jan 2, 2026, 12 days. School resumes Jan 5, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: How many teacher work days does Broward County Public Schools have in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Broward County Public Schools has 196 teacher work days in 2025-2026. This includes all 180 student instructional days plus 16 additional days for planning, professional development, and pre- and post-school year activities. Based on the official Broward County Public Schools teacher work calendar.

yearNumbers.label: Veterans Day Off
yearNumbers.detail: Veterans Day is a student holiday — one of few Florida districts to observe it as a full no-school day.

yearNumbers.label: Ends in June
yearNumbers.detail: The school year runs through early June, later than most neighboring South Florida districts that end in late May.

calendarNotes: Broward County Public Schools begins the 2025–2026 school year on August 11, 2025. In 2025–2026, Broward and Palm Beach County share the same Spring Break window (March 16–20); Miami-Dade breaks a week later (March 23–27). The school year ends June 5, 2026.
